title: Registered Agent Designation / Consent
officialFormNumber: Generic (state-parameterized; e.g. TX SOS Form 401-A consent)
disclaimer: Self-help document service — NOT legal or tax advice. A registered agent must have a physical address in the state and must consent. This tool can produce the designation document but CANNOT act as your registered agent. Verify requirements with the relevant Secretary of State; you file yourself.

fields.name: state
fields.label: State
fields.help: The state whose registered-agent rules apply (TX-deep; expandable). Requirements vary by state.

fields.name: agent_type
fields.label: Agent type
fields.help: Whether the registered agent is a person or a registered organization.

fields.name: agent_physical_address
fields.label: Agent physical address (in-state)
fields.help: A physical street address in the state (not a PO box). Process can be served here during business hours.

fields.name: consent_given
fields.label: Agent consents to appointment
fields.help: The agent must affirmatively consent. Many states require a signed consent.
